programs.title: Brassed Off
programs.desc: The closure of the local coalmine would mean the loss of countless jobs and the end of the village brass band. The bandleader is finding it difficult to motivate his members. But the band stick together and enter a national competition...

programs.title: The Movie Show
programs.desc: The Movie Show was an Australian film review program which was broadcast on SBS TV. Its history is divided into three parts, until it finally wound up in 2008.Reviews and interviews from the movie world.An attraction of the programme were the occasional disagreements of the hosts. Stratton and Pomeranz presented the show for the last time on 12 May 2004 and left SBS because of a perceived \.

programs.title: The Movie Show
programs.desc: In this episode, Margaret Pomeranz talks to Paul Byrnes about the most successful films at the Sydney Film Festival and to Paul Coulter from the WA Film Institute.

programs.title: The Majestic
programs.desc: During the 1950s blacklist era, a young and ambitious Hollywood screenwriter loses his job and sets off on a trip up the California coast without plans to return. Along the way, he gets in an accident, loses his memory and is found on the shore of a small town where it is believed that he is the son of one of the townsfolk who went missing in the war. As the missing soldier's return helps bring the town back to life, the writer finds new courage, love and the power of his convictions.

programs.title: The Straight Story
programs.desc: In his 70s, retired farmer Alvin Straight discovers his brother, Lyle, is critically ill. Stuck without a car or license in Iowa, he decides on a unique odyssey—traveling to Wisconsin on his old lawnmower. His journey is both picturesque and deeply spiritual.

programs.title: Love Thing
programs.desc: A dirty campaign forces movie star Marvin to flee from reporters and fans. Coincidentally, he immerses himself in the cosmos of the feminist/queer off-theatre 3000.
